summary: All 8 checks pass. The previously reported bug (puzzle-open-gate.reveals referencing scene ID instead of item IDs) has been fixed. Game is ready for publish.

solvabilityValidation.details: standard-game-validation.mjs reports 018-drowned-cistern: PASS - No issues found in script structure.

sceneCount.details: 6 scenes defined (cistern-entrance, overflow-chamber, pump-room, maintenance-tunnel, filter-gallery, drain-chamber). All referenced exits point to valid scenes.

assetCheck.details: 6 scene SVGs (scene-cistern-entrance.svg, scene-overflow-chamber.svg, scene-pump-room.svg, scene-maintenance-tunnel.svg, scene-filter-gallery.svg, scene-drain-chamber.svg) and 7 item SVGs (item-rusty-wrench.svg, item-gate-key.svg, item-blown-fuse.svg, item-oil-can.svg, item-repaired-fuse.svg, item-valve-wheel.svg, item-drain-handle.svg) present in art/ directory. All SVGs are valid and well-formed. HTML file renders without external asset dependencies (SVGs embedded inline).

itemIntegrity.details: 7 items (rusty-wrench, gate-key, blown-fuse, oil-can, repaired-fuse, valve-wheel, drain-handle) all defined. All foundIn fields match their parent scenes: rusty-wrench→cistern-entrance, gate-key→cistern-entrance, blown-fuse→overflow-chamber, oil-can→pump-room, repaired-fuse→pump-room, valve-wheel→maintenance-tunnel, drain-handle→filter-gallery.

puzzleValidation.details: 5 puzzles all have valid scene references, valid item requirements, valid reveals arrays, and blockedMessages. puzzle-open-gate.reveals is correctly set to [] (previously had "drain-chamber" which was a scene ID - now fixed).

fullPlaythroughSimulation.details: Complete playthrough path verified: cistern-entrance (take rusty-wrench, solve puzzle-remove-grate) → overflow-chamber (take blown-fuse, solve puzzle-unlock-grate) → pump-room (take oil-can, solve puzzle-oil-fuse with blown-fuse+oil-can → repaired-fuse, solve puzzle-insert-fuse with repaired-fuse) → maintenance-tunnel (take valve-wheel) → filter-gallery (solve puzzle-open-gate with valve-wheel, take drain-handle) → drain-chamber (use drain-handle for win). All 5 puzzles solvable. Win condition met.

lookDescriptions.details: All 18 lookDescriptions (3 per scene × 6 scenes) have meaningful, atmospheric text.

dataSchemaCheck.details: All puzzle reveals fields now contain only valid item IDs or empty arrays. The previous bug (puzzle-open-gate.reveals contained "drain-chamber", a scene ID) was fixed to reveals: []. No schema violations remain.
